title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Lavender
subTitle: Ayaan, a man with a traumatising past, finds his life changed when he meets Isha, a painter. However, his happiness is short-lived as his past haunts him.

title: Akashathinte Niram
subTitle: After attempting to rob an old man, a thief is trapped on a remote island where the people he meets, each with their own way of communicating, lead him on an unexpected journey of self-discovery.

title: Filler

title: Kadathanattu Makkam
subTitle: The family is torn apart when Maakam's envious sisters-in-law persuade their husbands to turn against her. In time, Maakam's son plots vengeance on his spiteful aunts.

title: Madanolsavam
subTitle: Raju, a young man, falls in love with Elizabeth, a beautiful woman, from his college. Though the couple make a new beginning, the doctor reveals to Raju that Elizabeth may not live long enough.

title: Sir C. P.
subTitle: Philip, a businessman, works towards making his educational institution the best in the city. However, trouble starts brewing in his life when Kariyachan, his rival, tries to defame him.

title: James And Alice
subTitle: The married life of James and Alice turns sour due to their busy lifestyles and they end up filing for a divorce. However, their lives take a turn when James meets with a car accident.

title: Ordinary
subTitle: Iravi works as a bus conductor on a bus that shuttles between a city and a hill station. His life changes when he gets involved in the villager's problems.

title: 101 Chodyangal
subTitle: A teacher asks one of her students to frame 101 questions, without thinking about the answers. The boy learns several life lessons while finishing his assignment.

title: 101 Chodyangal
subTitle: A teacher asks one of her students to frame 101 questions, without thinking about the answers. The boy learns several life lessons while finishing his assignment.

title: My Fan Ramu
subTitle: Ramu, an avid admirer of superstar Abhiram, dreams of becoming an actor. Soon, his life changes completely when he lands an opportunity to spend ten days with his idol.

title: Elektra
subTitle: Elektra is possessive of her father and tries to break his marriage with her mother. However, Elektra later teams up with her brother to seek revenge against her mother after her father is found dead.

title: Ee Adutha Kaalathu
subTitle: Six contrasting individuals belonging to different walks of lives find their lives converging due to unforeseen circumstances.

title: Kumkuma Cheppu
subTitle: An incessantly doubtful Indu gets married to Madhu. What was initially a happy marriage begins to unravel when she believes that Madhu is having an affair with several other women.

title: Ramante Edanthottam
subTitle: A man's blissful marital life shatters when he learns of his wife's infidelity with a resort owner they encounter on their vacation.

title: Vajram
subTitle: Devarajan, a criminal-turned-crane operator, is separated from his wife, Nandu, and son, Appu. He tries to reunite with his family even though he faces many obstacles.

title: Chathurangam
subTitle: A minister learns about Jimmy's secret talent and makes him a secretary for his political party. However, things take a turn when other members of the party get jealous.

title: Simhadri
subTitle: A farmer's son, Simhadri, ensures his sister marries into wealth, only to learn she is mistreated by her in-laws. Subsequently, he takes on the powerful family to restore her dignity.

title: The Reporter
subTitle: Eby Mathew strives to seek revenge and kidnaps the six people who were witness to his wife's murder, but did not save her.

title: Ivide
subTitle: Varun, an Indian-origin police detective in Atlanta, searches for a serial killer who targets Indians outsourced to companies in Atlanta.

title: 22 Female Kottayam
subTitle: Tessa, a young nurse, is betrayed by her lover, Cyril and sexually assaulted by his employer. After she is released from prison, she sets out to take revenge on her tormentors.

title: Mazha Peyyunnu Maddalam Kottunnu
subTitle: Madhavan, who recently returned from the US, wants to observe the character of his fiancee's family and therefore, swaps identities with his driver, Shambhu. Problems arise when she falls for Shambhu.

title: Georgekutty C/O Georgekutty
subTitle: Georgekutty lies about his financial status to get married into a rich family and slowly pay off his family's debt. But when his father-in-law learns of this, he treats Georgekutty badly.

title: Sadayam
subTitle: Sathyanathan is an artist who lives happily with his family. He comes across three girls and finds out that the girls' mother is a pimp and wants the daughters to enter the flesh trade.

title: Roudram
subTitle: An honest police officer tries to investigate the murder of a drug lord while dealing with corruption and influencial leaders.

title: 100 Days of Love
subTitle: A columnist reunites with his childhood rival and unexpectedly falls in love. However, just as he gathers the courage to confess, he discovers that she is engaged to another.
